data.title: Implement --attest flag in record-review.sh
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Add --attest <worktree-artifacts-dir> flag to record-review.sh. When --attest is provided, the script:
1. Reads the source worktree review-status from <worktree-artifacts-dir>/review-status
2. Verifies the source status is "passed" (exits non-zero if missing, failed, or stale)
3. Extracts score and review_hash from the source status file
4. Computes the current session diff hash via compute-diff-hash.sh
5. Writes a new review-status to the session artifacts dir with: status=passed, timestamp, diff_hash=<current>, score=<source>, review_hash=<source>, attest_source=<worktree-id>
6. Skips reviewer-findings.json reading, validation, and overlap check entirely
7. Does NOT require --reviewer-hash when --attest is provided (the hash comes from the source)

### Files to modify
- plugins/dso/hooks/record-review.sh

### Implementation notes
- Add --attest to the existing while/case argument parser (follows --expected-hash and --reviewer-hash pattern)
- Extract worktree ID from the basename of the worktree-artifacts-dir path
- When --attest is provided, bypass the entire reviewer-findings.json pipeline
- --reviewer-hash is NOT required when --attest is provided (mutually exclusive paths)
- Preserve existing checkpoint_cleared logic (attest path does not affect it)
- Compute diff hash AFTER all staging is complete

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] record-review.sh accepts --attest <worktree-artifacts-dir> flag
  Verify: bash plugins/dso/hooks/record-review.sh --attest /nonexistent 2>&1; test $? -ne 0
- [ ] --attest writes review-status with status=passed when source is passing
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-record-review-attest.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'test_attest_writes_passed_status.*PASS'
- [ ] --attest writes attest_source field in review-status
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-record-review-attest.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'test_attest_includes_attest_source.*PASS'
- [ ] --attest preserves source score and review_hash
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-record-review-attest.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'test_attest_preserves_source_score.*PASS'
- [ ] --attest refuses when source status missing or failed
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-record-review-attest.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'test_attest_refuses_missing_source.*PASS'
- [ ] All attest tests pass (GREEN)
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-record-review-attest.sh
